titleStmt.title: SII 24.279: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 279. (A.R. No. 139 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, ROOM ADJOINING THE TIRUPPAṆIYĀRA-AṞA�.

summary.p: Records the setting up of the images of Sarasvatī-dēvī, Vēdavyāsā-bhagavān and Hayagrīva which had been newly installed in the maṇḍapa built as an adjunct to the Sarasvatī-bhaṇḍāra (library) by Nīlakaṇṭha-Nāyaka of Pālapaḷḷi and the endowment of 100,000 kāśu for providing offerings to the deities. The donor of this inscription is known to us from an inscription of this king from Jambukēśvaram near Śrīraṅgam (No. 4 of 1937-38).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ .— pālapaḷḷi nilakaṇṭanāyakkar ceyvitta Inta sarasvati paṇṭārattukku śeṣamāṉa Ittirumaṇ
ṭapattu Ivar Ukantaruḷuvittu tirupratiṣṭhai paṇṇit tiruvārādhanaṅ koṇṭaru ḷukiṟa hayagrīvanāyaṉāṟkum carasvati
tevikkum śrīvedavyāsabhagavāṉukkum tiruvārādhaṉattukkum Amutupaṭi cāttu paṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum Uṭa
lāka nūṟāyiraṅkācu śrī paṇṭārattile Oṭukkavum . Itil policai koṇṭu Ivviṭaṅkaḷukku tiruvārādhaṉa[mum ka mu]
mutupaṭi cāttupaṭikaḷukku veṇṭuvaṉa tirukkoṭṭakārattile pa tāka viṭṭu naṭattippaṇṇaveṇu meṉṟu
collukaiyāle Ippaṭiye perumāḷ tiruppaḷḷi Aṟaiyil peraruḷāḷaṉ divya siṅhāsaṉattu nācciyāro
kka jiyarum tiruppati śrīvai ṇṇappa Built in. The following lines are engraved on a stone nearby:
1 caiyum nam cāk
2 vum ippaṭikku nam Olai
3 moḻintaruḷiṉa • paṭi
4 nūṟṟukku iraṇṭu • kal
5 ••••• oṉṟukku
Digital edition of SII 24.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
